bulletin_message.00: Unfortunately our town doesn't currently provide the necessary shelter arrangements for receiving a new citizen. Make sure to have enough beds for all of your citizens and the potential newcomer, and to satisfy whatever other requirements are expected from a town like ours!

Unfortunately our town doesn't currently provide the necessary shelter arrangements for receiving a new citizen. Make sure to have enough beds for all of your citizens and the potential newcomer, and to satisfy whatever other requirements are expected from a town like ours!

tooltips.proper_shelter: Hearthlings require beds and they must be properly sheltered from the elements.
tooltips.proper_shelter_t1: Town Tier 1: Hearthlings require any kind of bed and it must be properly sheltered from the elements.
tooltips.proper_shelter_t2: Town Tier 2: Hearthlings require good beds and they must be properly sheltered from the elements.
tooltips.proper_shelter_t3: Town Tier 3: Hearthlings require good beds, they must be properly sheltered from the elements and they must be on a well decorated spot with a decent Appeal score.

gameplayTab.use_advanced_setting_description:
Provides a slightly more challenging experience. When using 'Advanced Mode', upgrading your town to Tier 2 (Hearth upgrade) and then to Tier 3 (Shrine upgrade) will unlock more conditions for the shelter requirement to be considered fulfilled.
Tier 2 towns will need to have decent beds for their citizens (Comfy or better); thatch beds won't be enough anymore!
Tier 3 towns require each bed to have a certain appeal around them, so accomodations must be decorated and feel very homely!
gameplayTab.advanced_setting_appeal_description:
If using 'Advanced Mode', you can customize the appeal needed for beds to be considered proper shelter on Daily Updates for Tier 3 towns.
Note:This setting only works if 'Advanced Mode' is enabled.
(Default: 3)
